channel.title: Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) Industrial Control Systems (ICS) — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) Industrial Control Systems (ICS) (icscert).

image.title: Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) Industrial Control Systems (ICS) — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2026-10557 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Yarbo Android/iOS Mobile Application and Cloud Infrastructure Use of Hard-coded Credentials
item.description: The Yarbo Android and iOS applications contain hard-coded MQTT broker credentials that are identical for all users and all devices. These credentials are embedded in the application binary and are readily extractable via APK decompilation. The creden…

item.title: CVE-2026-7368 · 8.6 HIGH — Yarbo Android/iOS Mobile Application and Cloud Infrastructure Missing Authorization
item.description: The Yarbo cloud does not enforce per-device or per-user authorization. Any client possessing valid credentials, whether the shared hard-coded credentials or legitimate per-user credentials, can subscribe to wildcard topics covering all robots globall…

item.title: CVE-2026-50005 · 8.3 HIGH — Brickcom Cameras Use of Default Credentials
item.description: Brickcom cameras ship with default credentials that allows any unauthenticated remote attacker to silently access camera feeds.

item.title: CVE-2026-50245 · 8.3 HIGH — Brickcom Cameras Missing Authentication for Critical Function
item.description: Brickcom cameras allow unauthenticated access to live snapshot images via the /ONVIF endpoint and no authentication is required to retrieve still images from the camera feed.

item.title: CVE-2026-21404 · 6.3 MEDIUM — NAVTOR NavBox Use of Hard-coded Credentials
item.description: NAVTOR NavBox through version 4.16.1.20 contains hard-coded credentials within its Windows Communication Foundation (SOAP) implementation. If the SOAP functionality is enabled, a local attacker can extract credentials to bypass the intended transfer…

item.title: CVE-2026-40425 · 6.9 MEDIUM — MacGregor Voyage Data Recorder (VDR) G4e Files or Directories Accessible to External Parties
item.description: The administrator account for the Danelec MacGregor Voyage Data Recorder web interface can directly edit sensitive files related to authentication, potentially changing the root password.

item.title: CVE-2026-42929 · 8.7 HIGH — MacGregor Voyage Data Recorder (VDR) G4e Use of Hard-coded Credentials
item.description: Danelec MacGregor Voyage Data Recorder includes default accounts with hard-coded credentials.

item.title: CVE-2026-44611 · 5.9 MEDIUM — MacGregor Voyage Data Recorder (VDR) G4e Use of Password Hash With Insufficient Computational Effort
item.description: Danelec MacGregor Voyage Data Recorder passwords are stored with a hashing method which limits password length and is susceptible to brute force attacks.

item.title: CVE-2026-42951 · 5.9 MEDIUM — MacGregor Voyage Data Recorder (VDR) G4e Insufficiently Protected Credentials
item.description: An authenticated user can download a backup of the Danelec MacGregor Voyage Data Recorder device which includes account data and password hashes.

item.title: CVE-2026-42941 · 8.7 HIGH — MacGregor Voyage Data Recorder (VDR) G4e Use of Default Credentials
item.description: The Danelec MacGregor Voyage Data Recorder device includes a default username and password, with no enforced password change.

item.title: CVE-2026-7786 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Jinan USR IOT Technology Limited (PUSR) USR-W610 RS232/485 to Wi-Fi/Ethernet Converter Use of Hard-coded Credentials
item.description: Jinan USR IOT Technology Limited (PUSR) USR-W610 RS232/485 to Wi-Fi/Ethernet Converter device firmware contains plaintext administrative credentials embedded in the firmware image. These credentials can be extracted through firmware analysis and used…

item.title: CVE-2026-5768 · 8.8 HIGH — Fourth Frontier Frontier X Mobile Application, Frontier X2 Missing Authentication for Critical Function
item.description: The Frontier X2 device allows unauthenticated BLE read/write access to critical GATT characteristics without enforcing pairing authentication or authorization. This allows attackers within BLE range to perform unauthorized control of device functions…

item.title: CVE-2026-6824 · 8.4 HIGH — CP Plus 8 Ch. Network Video Recorder Cross-site Scripting
item.description: A stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability exists in certain 1xxx series NVR devices due to insufficient sanitization of user-supplied input in specific functional modules. Attackers can inject malicious scripts, which are then persistently st…

item.title: CVE-2026-5386 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — KMW CCTV Security Cameras Unverified Password Change
item.description: The affected KMW CCTV Security Cameras are vulnerable to a critical unauthenticated password reset. This flaw allows an attacker to remotely reset the administrator password to a known value without authentication, granting full access to the camera…

item.title: CVE-2026-9039 · 8.6 HIGH — Initialization of a resource with an insecure default in XCharge C6
item.description: A configuration weakness in the device’s remote management service allows an authenticated session to be established over a communication channel intended solely for vehicle-charger signaling. The service is accessible on interfaces exposed through t…

item.title: CVE-2026-9038 · 8.6 HIGH — Stack-based buffer overflow in XCharge C6
item.description: A stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability in the charging controller’s signal-processing logic allows an attacker with physical access to the charging interface to supply message fields that exceed expected bounds. Because the input is not sufficie…

item.title: CVE-2026-9037 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Download of code without integrity check in XCharge C6
item.description: A firmware update mechanism in the affected charging controller fails to validate the authenticity of firmware packages delivered through the device's management interface. Because cryptographic signatures are not verified, an attacker with the abili…

item.title: CVE-2026-7251 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Eppendorf BioFlo 320 Use of hard-coded password
item.description: Eppendorf BioFlo 320 is vulnerable due to VNC server using a hard-coded password. If a remote attacker knows the network address of any BioFlo 320 model with remote access enabled, they can gain full control of the user interface by using this passwo…

item.title: CVE-2026-8598 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Export Service in ZKTeco CCTV Cameras
item.description: An undocumented configuration export port is accessible on some models of ZKTeco CCTV cameras. This port does not require authentication and exposes critical information about the camera such as open services and camera account credentials.

item.title: CVE-2026-4293 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Kieback & Peter DDC Building Controllers Cross-site Scripting
item.description: The affected Kieback & Peter DDC building controllers are vulnerable to cross-site scripting, enabling JavaScript to be executed by the victim's browser, which allows the attacker to control the browser.

item.title: CVE-2026-8605 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Use of Hard-coded Credentials in ScadaBR
item.description: In ScadaBR version 1.2.0, a Use of Hard-Coded Credentials vulnerability could allow an attacker to access the SCADA system as admin.

item.title: CVE-2026-8604 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Cross-Site request forgery (CSRF) in ScadaBR
item.description: In ScadaBR version 1.2.0, a CSRF vulnerability could allow an attacker to trigger any authenticated action through a victim's session by luring any logged-in user to a malicious webpage.

item.title: CVE-2026-8603 · 8.7 HIGH — Improper neutralization of special elements used in an OS command ('OS command injection') in ScadaBR
item.description: In ScadaBR version 1.2.0, an OS Command Injection vulnerability could allow an attacker to execute commands as root on the SCADA system.

item.title: CVE-2026-8602 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Missing authentication for critical function in ScadaBR
item.description: In ScadaBR version 1.2.0, a Missing Authentication for Critical Function vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated attacker to send a HTTP GET requests to the SCADA system and inject arbitrary sensor readings.

item.title: CVE-2026-8108 · 7.8 HIGH — Fuji Electric Tellus Exposed Dangerous Method or Function
item.description: The installation of Fuji Tellus adds a driver to the kernel which grants all users read and write permissions.

item.title: CVE-2026-26289 · 8.4 HIGH — Subnet Solutions PowerSYSTEM Center Incorrect Authorization
item.description: PowerSYSTEM Center REST API endpoint for device account export allows an authenticated user with limited permissions to expose sensitive information normally restricted to administrative permissions only.

item.title: CVE-2026-33570 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Subnet Solutions PowerSYSTEM Center Incorrect Authorization
item.description: PowerSYSTEM Center REST API endpoint for devices allows a low privilege authenticated user to access information normally limited by operational permissions.

item.title: CVE-2026-35555 · 7 HIGH — Subnet Solutions PowerSYSTEM Center Incorrect Authorization
item.description: PowerSYSTEM Center feature for device project groups allows an authenticated user with limited permissions to perform an unauthorized deletion of project groups.

item.title: CVE-2025-65088 · 8.4 HIGH — Out-of-bounds read in Ashlar-Vellum Cobalt, Xenon, Argon, Lithium, Cobalt Share
item.description: An Out-of-Bounds Read vulnerability is present in Ashlar-Vellum Cobalt, Xenon, Argon, Lithium, and Cobalt Share versions 12.6.1204.216 and prior that could allow an attacker to disclose information or execute arbitrary code when a specially crafted V…

item.title: CVE-2025-65087 · 8.4 HIGH — Out-of-bounds read in Ashlar-Vellum Cobalt, Xenon, Argon, Lithium, Cobalt Share
item.description: An Out-of-Bounds Read vulnerability is present in Ashlar-Vellum Cobalt, Xenon, Argon, Lithium, and Cobalt Share versions 12.6.1204.216 and prior that could allow an attacker to disclose information or execute arbitrary code when a specially crafted V…

item.title: CVE-2025-65086 · 8.4 HIGH — Out-of-bounds write in Ashlar-Vellum Cobalt, Xenon, Argon, Lithium, Cobalt Share
item.description: An Out-of-Bounds Write vulnerability is present in Ashlar-Vellum Cobalt, Xenon, Argon, Lithium, and Cobalt Share versions 12.6.1204.216 and prior that could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary code when a specially crafted VC6 file is being parsed…

item.title: CVE-2026-35504 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Subnet Solutions PowerSYSTEM Center CRLF injection
item.description: PowerSYSTEM Center email notification service is affected by a CRLF injection vulnerability when using SMTPS communication.

item.title: CVE-2025-12659 · 7.8 HIGH — Heap-based buffer overflow in Siemens Simcenter Femap
item.description: Siemens Simcenter Femap contains a memory corruption vulnerability while parsing specially crafted IPT files. This could allow an attacker to execute code in the context of the current process.

item.title: CVE-2026-6411 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — MAXHUB Pivot Client Application Use of a Broken or Risky Cryptographic Algorithm
item.description: This vulnerability, in the MAXHUB Pivot client application versions prior to v1.36.2, may allow an attacker to obtain encrypted tenant email addresses and related metadata from any tenant. Due to the presence of a hardcoded AES key within the applica…

item.title: CVE-2026-6807 · 5.5 MEDIUM 👻 — NSA GRASSMARLIN Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference
item.description: A vulnerability in GRASSMARLIN v3.2.1 allows crafted session data to trigger improper handling of XML input, which may result in unintended exposure of sensitive information. The flaw stems from insufficient hardening of the XML parsing process.

item.title: CVE-2026-3893 · 9.4 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Carlson Software VASCO-B GNSS Receiver Missing Authentication for Critical Function
item.description: The Carlson VASCO-B GNSS Receiver lacks an authentication mechanism, allowing an attacker with network access to directly access and modify its configuration and operational functions without needing credentials.

item.title: CVE-2026-20766 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Milesight Cameras Heap-based Buffer Overflow
item.description: An out-of-bounds memory access vulnerability exists in specific firmware versions of Milesight AIOT cameras.

item.title: CVE-2026-32649 · 7.3 HIGH — Milesight Cameras OS Command Injection
item.description: A command injection vulnerability exists in the web server of specific firmware versions of Milesight cameras.

item.title: CVE-2026-32644 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Milesight Cameras Use of Hard-coded Cryptographic Key
item.description: Specific firmware versions of Milesight AIOT cameras use SSL certificates with default private keys.

item.title: CVE-2026-27785 · 8.8 HIGH — Milesight Cameras Use of Hard-coded Credentials
item.description: Specific firmware versions of Milesight AIOT camera firmware contain hard-coded credentials.

item.title: CVE-2026-28747 · 7.3 HIGH — Milesight Cameras Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key
item.description: A weak key generation vulnerability exists in specific firmware versions of Milesight AIOT cameras allows authorization to be bypassed.

item.title: CVE-2026-25775 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SenseLive X3050 Missing authentication for critical function
item.description: A vulnerability in SenseLive X3050’s remote management service allows firmware retrieval and update operations to be performed without authentication or authorization. The service accepts firmware-related requests from any reachable host and does not…

item.title: CVE-2026-35064 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — SenseLive X3050 Missing authentication for critical function
item.description: A vulnerability in SenseLive X3050’s management ecosystem allows unauthenticated discovery of deployed units through the vendor’s management protocol, enabling identification of device presence, identifiers, and management interfaces without requirin…

item.title: CVE-2026-40620 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SenseLive X3050 Missing authentication for critical function
item.description: A vulnerability in SenseLive X3050’s embedded management service allows full administrative control to be established without any form of authentication or authorization on the SenseLive config application. The service accepts management connections…

item.title: CVE-2026-27841 · 8.4 HIGH 🌩️ — SenseLive X3050 Cross-Site request forgery
item.description: A vulnerability in SenseLive X3050's web management interface allows state-changing operations to be triggered without proper Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) protections. Because the application does not enforce server-side validation of request or…

item.title: CVE-2026-40623 · 8.1 HIGH — SenseLive X3050 Missing Authorization
item.description: A vulnerability in SenseLive X3050's web management interface allows critical system and network configuration parameters to be modified without sufficient validation and safety controls. Due to inadequate enforcement of constraints on sensitive func…

item.title: CVE-2026-40431 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — SenseLive X3050 Cleartext transmission of sensitive information
item.description: A vulnerability exists in SenseLive X3050’s web management interface due to its reliance on unencrypted HTTP for all administrative communication. Because management traffic, including authentication attempts and configuration data, is transmitted in…

item.title: CVE-2026-27843 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SenseLive X3050 Missing authentication for critical function
item.description: A vulnerability exists in SenseLive X3050's web management interface that allows critical configuration parameters to be modified without sufficient authentication or server-side validation. By applying unsupported or disruptive values to recovery me…

item.title: CVE-2026-39462 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SenseLive X3050 Insufficiently Protected Credentials
item.description: A vulnerability exists in SenseLive X3050’s web management interface in which password updates are not reliably applied due to improper handling of credential changes on the backend. After the device undergoes a factory restore using the SenseLive Co…

item.title: CVE-2026-35503 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SenseLive X3050 Use of Hard-coded Credentials
item.description: A vulnerability in SenseLive X3050’s web management interface allows authentication logic to be performed entirely on the client side, relying on hardcoded values within browser-executed scripts rather than server-side verification. An attacker with…
